items.title: Best Personal Loan Alternatives: 10 Options to Compare

serpObservations.intent: Commercial BOFU comparison. Search results emphasize lender roundups, comparison tables, APR/fee/eligibility criteria, calculators, and alternative financing options by use case.
coveragePatterns: warnings about collateral, fees and repayment discipline
gapsUsed: compare alternatives before applying rather than ranking lenders only
match alternatives by borrowing purpose and risk
include provider payment plans, debt management and earned wage access alongside credit products
avoid fabricated lender reviews, prices or first-hand testing claims

qa.editorialSeoReview: passed: intent, H1, metadata, canonical, schema, links, image, sitemap, blog index, sensitive finance claims
qa.mobileRender: passed: 390x844 viewport, image loaded, no overflow
qa.production: passed: HTTP 200, expected H1, canonical, blog index, sitemap and image on https://loanfy.io/blog/best-personal-loan-alternatives/

items.title: Best Emergency Loan Options Online: 7 Choices to Compare

serpObservations.intent: Commercial BOFU comparison. Results emphasize emergency personal loan roundups, fast funding, best-for lender labels, APR/fee/eligibility tables, pros and cons, application steps, alternatives and FAQs.
coveragePatterns: comparison tables with APR, loan amount, credit score and funding speed
warnings about origination fees, payday loans, title loans and repayment strain
FAQs about same-day funding, credit score and alternatives
gapsUsed: rank emergency loan options by borrower situation rather than claiming invented lender testing
separate online personal loans from provider payment plans, credit unions and payroll advances
explain speed versus affordability trade-offs before the CTA
cite official sources for APR, payday loan risk and credit union payday alternative loans

qa.build: production GitHub Actions passed: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages run 29501672923; local npm run build did not complete in the desktop sandbox, but the remote Eleventy build completed successfully
qa.editorialSeoReview: passed: intent, originality, H1, title, meta description, canonical, Open Graph, Article schema, FAQ schema, internal links, external sources, image alt, finance claims and canibalization against /emergency-loans/
qa.desktopRender: passed: production browser, expected H1/canonical, featured image loaded, no overflow
qa.mobileRender: passed: production browser at 390x844, expected H1/canonical, image loaded, no overflow after grid/nav CSS fix
qa.production: passed: HTTP 200, expected H1, canonical, CSS cache-busted, blog index link, sitemap entry and image JPEG on https://loanfy.io/blog/best-emergency-loan-options-online/
